creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the report and patch Fabian

I'm seeing a ton of errors during make test (platform freebsd13 -- Python 3.8.3, pytest-4.5.0, py-1.8.1, pluggy-0.12.0), mostly of type:

  Fuzzy-matching is currently disabled as the "tlsh" module is unavailable

Should these be skipped (other tests skip correctly when needed features arent available)?

Is there a TEST_DEPENDS we can add to cover the functionality?

Also seeing quite a few of the following:

   IndexError: list index out of range

Is diffoscope supposed to currently support 3.8?
